target: Chapter 20: Temple of Demons
It's so quiet…
Yes, it's been silent for ages.

If we're in here like this,
can I really hide the hand signal?

So far so good, but…
It's an impromptu plan.
…What do you think, Ryunosuke?

We couldn't verify it…
If the signal disappears, Haine will notice,
and if we act too soon, we'll give them time to think.

So far nothing's happened,
and your decision to enter two hours ago…
was probably correct.

Even if we hide it well,
won't the Gil itself be found?
The presence of this Gil is like others; where strays exist, it won’t seem odd... Shinpei said it wouldn’t get caught.

"…If we're found, then let's just fight."
Whether cautious or bold… I don't know.
Ryunosuke?
…They're here!
Shinpei! You came back??

Really Shinpei!? 
What happened?! Where's Ushio?!
Ushio…!!
Everyone! I'm back!!!

Welcome home…
!!!
Karikiri Masahito

So this is why…!
Hiding the hand's position…
…We must hurry to Hiruko Cave.
Karikiri-san!

Ah, Koyumiba-san?
What's wrong with you?

You see… I wanted to ask about the live performance,
there was a discussion on including Hitogashima's history in the PR talk…

What?
I haven't heard of that.

It turned out there were more fans than expected,
so we started talking about what else could be done…
and that's how it came up.

So I was told to ask you about the history first,
could I have a little time…?

Ah…
If that's the case then--

Wait a second!?
It hurts so much!! 
My stomach is killing me!!

Are you okay?!
…Oh, I have medicine with me!
I'll get it right away and wait here--

No no no,
I need to go to the toilet immediately!!
We'll talk about the event later!
Wait, please!
Koyumiba-san.

Ah, Shinpei…
Is Karikiri-san okay…?

Don't worry.
I'll take care of it,
just focus on the live performance now.
Okay…
…Phew.

I wanted to hold you back a bit longer…
But this is too dangerous…

Shinpei's shadow… 
It looks just like him, but the eyes are terrifyingly different…

Just talking to it for a bit,
my hands won't stop shaking…
All I can do is this…
Shinpei, please try your best.

Did we get caught?
Our plan.
Ah, that's a problem.

Now their top priority will be us for sure.  
They won't start the massacre until they kill us.
Ah!
Shinpei Ajiro

Gil sensed the shadow's presence…
It's 2 o'clock direction… twenty meters ahead!!

Coming this way… 
We were definitely caught!
Ow! I was hit by something!!

It's like a needle… it shot out teeth?!
This thing is targeting the shadow stitching!!
Tokiko, are you okay!?

(When we control Gil from the inside,
complex commands can be issued but damage to Gil is transmitted to Tokiko.)

(Shoot! Being in Gil means it's pitch black,
and I can't see the outside!
Should we go out and fight?)

Tokiko! 
I'll go fight for you!!

It's fine!
I'll stop it!!!

Now! 
Everyone, go ahead!!
I can handle this alone!

What??
You think I'd leave you behind!?

Go already!!
It's not the time to be dawdling here!!!

…Okay, thank you…
!!!
No, I should be thanking you.

Thank you very much, Shinpei-san. 
You forgave me…
Tokiko… don't die!!!

You too, 
don't hold everyone back!
Go… stop!?

No…
That's where Hiruko sleeps!
Yes… there's a black wall.

It's not just a black wall.  
No presence inside…
it's mud walls!!!
Huh!

(The presence of Shide!!!
It's almost here!!)
Shinpei!!

Yes…
From the sea and from within…  
It's coming at a crazy speed!!!

Move!
I'll blast through this wall!

Wow!?
Blood is coming out of the wall!!!
No, it's not good…
It's regenerating!

Let me try it! 
If I hack into it… ouch!!

Ushio!
Are you okay??

It's painful…
They hacked back… 
This wall is Hiruko herself in 3D!

Damn it!!!
There's definitely Hiruko on the other side of this wall!!
(They won't let us through easily…)

(Time is limited!
The ultimate move to defeat Hiruko,
but I can't hold back now!!)

Everyone… let's go!
We'll blow up the wall with bombs!

What??
Where are those things!?
They're here.

Before coming here,
Mio stole these!

Wow… 
This is a fireworks display!!
How could you hide something like this??
Light it, and take cover behind the rocks!
We did it!?

(The feeling…!
The same as when Ushio said it felt like scratching a blackboard…)

(I can feel Hiruko's presence…!
No mistake. It opened up!!)
Let's go before the hole closes.

Ugh…
It has a weird elasticity, it feels awful…

…The smell of gunpowder and 
a steak-like aroma.

Stop it!
It's making me lose my appetite for steaks!!

There are also smells like raspberries and 
rum…
That's not good at all!!!
(…Shide is coming!!)

Get down!
Nezu-san!!!
Eat this!!!
The hole is closing!!
Nezu-san, hurry!!!
Wait a second!!

It's no good with guns…
But this works!

Don't mind me!!
Go ahead!!!
Nezu-san!!

Go!
Before the hole closes!!!

You're going to die!?
Old man!!

When you hesitate…
think about what your future self would do and decide.
Then there'll be no regrets.
(What would my future self do…?)

Going to die!?
Uncle!!

When you're confused…
Think about what your future self would do, then make a decision.
Then there'll be no regrets.
(What my future self… would do…)
I'm counting on you here…!!
Hey… tell Ryunosuke to take care of it.

Yes!  
Let's go, everyone!
Nezu Ginjiro
…That's embarrassing… you…

Masahito…  
Or maybe Rock… You?!"

Whatever, it's fine either way…  
Silver Boy…

Because of our childhood friendship… move aside…  
I don't want to hear your screams.
Don't take me for granted!

If you wanna pass,  
kill me first!!!
